args:
set -eu
doctor_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor)
printf '%s' "$doctor_out" | grep -q 'host os='
printf '%s' "$doctor_out" | grep -q 'vendor='
printf '%s' "$doctor_out" | grep -q 'flashinfer_prebuilt='
printf 'doctor\n'
